tracks.meaning: to strike a ball or opponent with the foot in football, soccer, or martial arts
to strike or hit something forcefully with the foot
to start or begin something with energy or enthusiasm
a free kick awarded in soccer as a penalty for a foul
a distinctive style or rhythmic pattern in music, especially in hip-hop or funk
a sudden movement of the leg or foot, especially involuntary or from a fetus
to propel oneself forward by pushing with the legs, as in swimming
